{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205275559201C450B888F61E942"}"},"total":1917},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7460486332373058366","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"逻辑清晰，生动有趣，将上个世纪人们的生活展现在我们眼前，对人性的刻画很真实"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737032679,"group_id":"7441508398786432062","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N94MKlHZQm3lUIXEb8zib0QRu70lQXQNLoMEGv9Zvk+U","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3560672088049193","user_name":"爱吃花样橙汁的陈小慧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3560672088049193","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441508398786432062","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女主，曹丞相，怼天怼地，爆爽】
许峰是村里出了名的混蛋，
酗酒不说，对媳妇动辄就是打骂。
姐姐林惜雪欠下巨款，媳妇林惜月求救许峰置之不理。
最终林惜雪被债主逼死，
导致伤心欲绝的媳妇流产并彻底死心。
直到姐妹俩的家人找过来，
许峰才知道姐妹俩竟然是林家千金！
林家知晓后，直接把许峰打死给姐姐赔命！
弥留之际，许峰才幡然醒悟自己有多混蛋。
那这条烂命赔给林惜雪和未出世的孩子吧，
可媳妇一身的伤痛又该如何弥补…
好在系统给许峰一次重来的机会。
那就从挽救林惜雪开始，
给媳妇儿消耗物资就能翻倍奖励的系统功能，
在那个人人吃不饱饭的年代，把日子过得风生水起！
［短剧重生年代，开局消费奖励翻倍原作］","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bbe168a8f30283b4a38baf8c65806065","author":"正新鸡排","author_id":"","book_id":"7441508398786432062","book_name":"重生年代：开局拯救绝美大姨子！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d89860","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7441508446911857214","read_count":"56068","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1707094"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"612","tags":"都市种田,都市,系统,重生,多女主,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2084c07901ed9cb1cc3d8de46079714d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312475&x-signature=NOdSqR%2FpD2byIelo5Loib93HjDw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3971087650269966","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"131"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205275559201C450B888F61E942"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"liste ［短剧重生年代，开局消费奖励翻倍原作］","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bbe168a8f30283b4a38baf8c65806065","author":"正新鸡排","author_id":"","book_id":"7441508398786432062","book_name":"重生年代：开局拯救绝美大姨子！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d89860","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7441508446911857214","read_count":"56068","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1707094"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"612","tags":"都市种田,都市,系统,重生,多女主,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2084c07901ed9cb1cc3d8de46079714d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312475&x-signature=NOdSqR%2FpD2byIelo5Loib93HjDw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3971087650269966","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205275559201C450B888F61E942"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7050,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11415,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":11036},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7469567110774211352","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"你的简介内容都忘了，我是来看曹的，结果全是水，
毒点1
60年代，资本家只能断尾求生，你把那个年代的资本写的太厉害了，饭馆吃饭遇到了，特嚣张，那个年代资本夹着尾巴，都担心会被清算，更别说嚣张了！
大院另说
毒点2
开始看简介以为是带系统的重生曹，种田文那种，然后发现写到了四合院，有些脱离主题了，但也无所谓，读者主要就是为了多女主曹，然后四合院时间线全是乱的！（秦淮茹还没嫁过去，篓子婚了，于莉已婚）
毒点3
收女，拖拖拉拉的，大哥你是后宫文啊！该收都要收了，有系统的人了，咋还那么废！
后宫文几大禁忌（漏女，送女，死女，绿帽）结果你自己看看想弄几个
先说说绿的部分，1秦淮茹结婚前不早点截胡，等结婚自己无意识的下手了，有绿的倾向，
虽然写死了贾东旭，算是小毒吧
2篓子，时间线乱了，篓子已婚，这是后宫文，篓子出场后面肯定要收的，写那么多篓子和许大茂的感情戏，想干嘛？
在说说送女部分    划重点这是带系统的后宫文，你舔傻柱干嘛？想学厨艺系统是摆设嘛，还把秦淮茹给傻柱撮合！     要不要那么毒啊，重点开后宫啊
于莉  磨磨唧唧那么多章还没搞定！

有系统，水了那么久还是个小小的采购，收女也没收几个，工作还需要看科长脸色，你可能还没搞明白，60年代能搞到物资是什么概念，那是厂长都要巴结的人物！


欢迎各位书友的补充"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739153751,"group_id":"7441508398786432062","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2295401390277672"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441508398786432062","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"175"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"4","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":36878,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":113},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7457252054681518872","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，就是更新太少，
